attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Path to a partial, relative to src/.

elements.name: each
elements.description: posthtml-expressions loop. Renders its children for each item.

attributes.name: loop
attributes.description: Loop expression: `item in array` or `item, index in array`.

elements.name: fill-age
elements.description: Fills the "age" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-current-state
elements.description: Fills the "current-state" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-desc
elements.description: Fills the "desc" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-disease
elements.description: Fills the "disease" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-header
elements.description: Fills the "header" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-house
elements.description: Fills the "house" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-link
elements.description: Fills the "link" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-more
elements.description: Fills the "more" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-name
elements.description: Fills the "name" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-price
elements.description: Fills the "price" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-result
elements.description: Fills the "result" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-stat
elements.description: Fills the "stat" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-state
elements.description: Fills the "state" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-tag
elements.description: Fills the "tag" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-tags
elements.description: Fills the "tags" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-time
elements.description: Fills the "time" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-title
elements.description: Fills the "title" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: fill-unit
elements.description: Fills the "unit" slot of the parent component.

elements.name: sg-snippet
elements.description: Styleguide code snippet. Serializes its content to escaped HTML with a title bar and a Copy button.

elements.name: x-advantages-mini-card
elements.description: Advantages mini card: title + optional stack of tag pills. Slots:   <fill-header> — optional: header bar (e.g. label + counter)   <fill-title>  — card title (rendered in <h3>)   <fill-tags>   — optional: any number of <x-tag-advantages> (or other markup)

elements.name: x-button
elements.description: Renders <a> when href is set, otherwise <button>.

elements.name: x-button-nav
elements.description: Text link with optional 16px icon. Renders <a> when href is set, otherwise <button>.

elements.name: x-button-social
elements.description: Renders <a> when href is set, otherwise <button>.

elements.name: x-history-card
elements.description: History card: title + disease + house + name + age + state + desc + result + current-state + more + image Composes <x-tag>.

elements.name: x-pagination
elements.description: Slide control for carousels. Active step is a progress bar (0-100% fill), inactive steps are dots. Each step is a <button>.

elements.name: x-pansionat-big-card
elements.description: Promotion card: tag + title + description + text-link, with a decorative blob. Composes <x-tag> and <x-text-link> internally.

elements.name: x-pansionat-card
elements.description: Promotion card: tag + title + description + text-link, with a decorative blob. Composes <x-tag> and <x-text-link> internally.

elements.name: x-promo-card
elements.description: Promotion card: img + tag + title + description + text-link Composes <x-tag> and <x-text-link> internally.

elements.name: x-promo-mini-card
elements.description: Promotion card: tag + title + description + text-link, with a decorative blob. Composes <x-tag> and <x-text-link> internally.

elements.name: x-promo-mini-slider
elements.description: Wrapper around <x-promo-mini-card>s with stack animation + auto-rotate. Controls (pagination dots + prev/next buttons) are built automatically. The runtime JS fills pagination to match the card count.

elements.name: x-room-card
elements.description: Room card: tag + title + description + image + price + unit Composes <x-number-of-seats>.

elements.name: x-tag
elements.description: Small uppercase label. Renders a <span> with optional 14px icon on the left.

elements.name: x-tag-advantages
elements.description: Small uppercase label. Renders a <span> with icon on the left.

elements.name: x-text-link
elements.description: Text link with optional 16px icon. Renders <a> when href is set, otherwise <button>.
